regime_badge_text: POSITIVE Gamma Regime: Containment and Mean Reversion
regime_paragraph_1: SPX 0DTE is in a positive gamma environment with net gamma exposure around +6B, centered in the 7110-7150 zone. This gamma structure supports dampened volatility and containment, encouraging mean reversion within this defined range rather than directional follow-through.
regime_paragraph_2: The dominant active control zone near 7150 is holding above spot by about 17.5 points, acting as a local magnet that tempers moves higher and forces premium decay on upside risk. The distant put wall at 6900 is structurally relevant as a longer-term floor but not an immediate influence given the large spot separation.
regime_paragraph_3: Charm bias remains a secondary, intraday factor at this stage, exerting mild supportive influence on drift inside the control zone without creating a strong pin near 7150. Vanna relevance is low under current volatility, so gamma remains the primary driver of dynamics here.
primary_setup_title: Iron Condor Near Active Control Zone
primary_setup_body: Build an iron condor straddling the 7110–7150 gamma-rich zone to exploit decay and expected mean reversion. Acceptance below 7150 supports call credit spread leg, while support near 7110 underpins put credit leg. With positive gamma present, premium decay should accelerate inside this range.
secondary_setup_body: A call credit spread capped at 7200 benefits from failed upside acceptance above 7150, which currently acts as a containment level. Positioning here offers asymmetric risk if spot fails to ratchet meaningfully through the upper boundary and volatility remains subdued.
avoid_body: Given the positive gamma regime and spot residing in a dominant call-wall zone, directional debit spreads may underperform as volatility is dampened and price is prone to mean-reversion. Directional conviction is best deferred until a structural regime shift occurs.
wildcard_title: Monitor For Pin Near 7150 Late In Day
wildcard_body: If the market approaches 7150 late in the session, charm may reinforce pinning behavior amplifying drift compression around this strike. This dynamic could favor tighter range trades or butterfly structures designed to benefit from late-day pin risk.

options_trade_ideas.name: 7110/7150 Iron Condor
options_trade_ideas.thesis: Leverage positive gamma in the concentrated control zone for premium decay and mean reversion.
options_trade_ideas.structure: Sell 7110 put spread and sell 7150 call spread
options_trade_ideas.when_valid: While spot remains inside 7110–7150 zone with no sustained break outside
options_trade_ideas.risk_note: Invalidates with acceptance below 7110 or above 7150

options_trade_ideas.name: 7150/7200 Call Credit Spread
options_trade_ideas.thesis: Position for failed upside acceptance above 7150, capitalizing on call resistance and premium decay.
options_trade_ideas.when_valid: Spot below 7200 and no clean daily close above 7150

options_trade_ideas.name: Butterfly Near 7150 (Late Day)
options_trade_ideas.thesis: Capture potential charm-reinforced pin near 7150 in late trading hours.
options_trade_ideas.structure: Long butterfly centered on 7150 call or put strikes
options_trade_ideas.when_valid: If price closes into the 7150 pin zone late in session
options_trade_ideas.risk_note: Invalidates if price moves decisively away from 7150 in final 30 minutes

timing_notes.note: Charm begins to subtly affect drift and decay, supporting containment inside control zone without enforcing strong pinning.
Gamma dominance stabilizes price, reducing impulse moves and encouraging reversion within the 7110–7150 range.
Favorable volatility conditions for condors and call credit spreads as delayed charm influence remains secondary.
Charm may amplify pin risk near 7150, offering opportunities for butterfly structures targeting late-day compression.

summary_cards.bias: Mean reversion favored within 7110–7150 call-wall control zone under positive gamma
summary_cards.pin_zone: Active zone near 7150 offers containment; no immediate pin but watch late day
summary_cards.bull_trigger: Sustained acceptance above 7200 invalidates containment, signals bullish acceleration
summary_cards.bear_trigger: Break and hold below 7110/bear trigger near 6900 would shift regime and increase downside risk
summary_cards.wildcard: Charm may create pinning near 7150 late in day, enabling short-term compression plays
